# RCSMessage.Content.geolocationPush(_:)

**Case**

A content type for geolocation push content.

## Declaration

```swift
case geolocationPush(RCSMessage.GeolocationPush)
```

## Working with geolocation pushes

- **RCSMessage.GeolocationPush**: A structure that represents geolocation push content in an RCS message.
